title: Section 16
content: 1[16. Restriction on transfer of Toxic Chemical or Precursor listed in Schedule 2.--No person shall transfer to, or receive from, a State which is not a party to the Convention or any person who is not a citizen of a State Party, any Toxic Chemical or Precursor listed in Schedule 2 in the Annex on Chemicals to the Convention.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 36 of 2012, s. 3, for section 16 (w.e.f. 23-11-2012).
